scripts.build: npm run tailwind:build && npm run merge:build
scripts.merge:watch: shx echo 'Watching CSS...' && shx cat ./public/assets/css/swiper-bundle.css ./public/assets/css/temp-output.css > ./public/assets/css/output.css && shx watch "./public/assets/css/temp-output.css" "shx cat ./public/assets/css/swiper-bundle.css ./public/assets/css/temp-output.css > ./public/assets/css/output.css"
